'''Hishinu Booj''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Author/Legends|playwright]].

==Biography==
Hishinu Booj's most famous work was "[[The Trickery of Vosdia Nooma]]," produced in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Inspiration for the drama was drawn from the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]], who assisted in [[Writing/Legends|writing]] the drama with some additional help from [[Ruris Plin]]. The play was directed by Booj himself and premiered at the [[Equator City First Stage]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
